plugins.name: tt
plugins.description: Commands for discovering your unknowns across the map-vs-territory workflow (trq212, 'The map is not the territory'). Numbered by phase — 0x before: /01-blindspot, /02-brainstorm, /03-interview, /04-references; 1x plan/during: /10-plan; 2x after: /20-pitch, /21-comprehend. Plus skills towles-tool and parallel-slots.
